text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I heard Oguri's going to run in the Yasuda Kinen!
The mile's one of my best distances, so I'm super
excited to face her there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno's going to run in the Yasuda Kinen too! I'm
beyond ecstatic to have my dream race right
around the corner, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Later, when I run into Yaeno, she warned me that
Oguri might devour my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer says Yaeno might not be feeling very
confident because Oguri is so good in so many
distances.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If Yaeno's feeling scared, then I have to show up
and run so well, it'll prove to her that Oguri
doesn't devour dreams!
